source.name: The Barber
source.author: Sewage Orc
source.description:
In this Document: Featured in this document, you'll find everything you need to create a Barber, including feats to bolster your build and ways to add a touch of Barber flavor to any playable character, regardless of their class. Also included are the Surgeon Background option and two new items: the Barber's Kit and the Cut-Throat Razor.
What is a Barber? A Barber is a Fighter subclass that specializes in non-magical healing. Its class features focus on keeping both themselves and their allies in the fight, while still holding their own thanks to the core strengths of the Fighter class.
Don't Barbers Cut Hair? While this is true of the modern-day barber, it hasn't always been the case. During the Middle Ages—roughly from the 11th to the 18th centuries—barbers were considered the de facto surgeons of the time. Not because they were the most educated, but simply out of necessity. Their profession required them to be highly dexterous, and they had access to extremely sharp tools. Physicians of the era often considered surgery beneath them, focusing instead on medicines and treatments that would seem ill-advised by modern medical standards. Barbers, on the other hand, performed procedures such as cutting hair, pulling teeth, bloodletting, and even amputations.
